announcements.text: Hi everyone,I received an email yesterday informing me that Brown Bear Calendar, which we have used for years to manage tissue culture room hood reservations, will discontinue its free service and transition to a paid model effective August 1, 2026.As a result, I have implemented a new reservation system that I developed and recently finalized. The new system can be accessed using the same link location where the Brown Bear Calendar link was previously posted.I hope you find the new system more modern and intuitive. As always, please notify me immediately if you encounter any issues so I can investigate and resolve them.Best,Max
announcements.html:
Hi everyone,

I received an email yesterday informing me that Brown Bear Calendar, which we have used for years to manage tissue culture room hood reservations, will discontinue its free service and transition to a paid model effective August 1, 2026.

As a result, I have implemented a new reservation system that I developed and recently finalized. The new system can be accessed using the same link location where the Brown Bear Calendar link was previously posted.

I hope you find the new system more modern and intuitive. As always, please notify me immediately if you encounter any issues so I can investigate and resolve them.

Best,

Max

announcements.text: ATTENTION!:On Tuesday, 5/26, the contents of Bart will be moved to a backup LN unit provided by facilities so that we can have someone perform maintenance work on Bart. We will bring up the spare unit, fill it with our racks, and it will sit right where Bart is until the maintenance work is complete.
announcements.html:
ATTENTION!:
On Tuesday, 5/26, the contents of Bart will be moved to a backup LN unit provided by facilities so that we can have someone perform maintenance work on Bart. We will bring up the spare unit, fill it with our racks, and it will sit right where Bart is until the maintenance work is complete.

labMeetings.title: Lab Meeting!
labMeetings.description: 3600 Civic Center Blvd., RM16-102B @ 11:30am. Join us for pizza and some general announcements/updates!
